name: Mayonnaise Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Use only real mayonnaise, not salad dressing type.
2. Combine all the ingredients in a large bowl and mix well until just combined.
3. Divide the dough evenly among 12 greased muffin tins.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius) for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. This recipe can be doubled if needed. Store leftovers in an airtight container and reheat gently in the refrigerator.
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
